gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor smiles broadly, steps forward with excitement, and gestures with both arms to emphasize the exploration of multiplication
a person leans slightly toward the class, tilts their head, and raises one hand as if inviting responses about multiplication
a tutor stands tall, gestures with one hand open in front, and moves it forward while explaining factors and products in multiplication
a person points with an animated expression while taking a step to the side, illustrating the factors 3 and 4 leading to the product 12
a tutor claps their hands together and gently shifts their weight, inviting the students to solve a word problem about multiplication
a person leans forward slightly, raises both hands with fingers spread, and moves them outward to illustrate the 4 bags with 3 apples each
a tutor raises arms in celebration, beams at the class, and takes a small step backward, expressing pride in the students’ progress
a person nods enthusiastically, places one hand on their heart, and gestures in a circular motion to reinforce the concept of repeated addition
